name: The Erased Cities
description: A divergence where Heliograph's maps begin unmaking places instead of creating them — entire cities vanishing from collective memory weeks before disappearing from the world.

divergence_event.description: Heliograph stops drawing new places. Instead, its existing maps begin to fade — and so do the cities they represent.

visual.style_adjustment: fading lines, gaps in maps, color drained from buildings, dust falling through projection light
